title: Ahead is allowed. Ahead is safe
subtitle: An affirmation for when getting ahead feels like something that happens to other people.
excerpt: A short affirmation for when the family belief that you don't get ahead is louder than your own sense of what's possible. Say it in the morning, hand on heart, for three days.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 9 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Release 'we never get ahead' beliefs."

content.text: A short affirmation for the belief that getting ahead isn't something available to your family. The statement separates your present from the pattern behind you.
Ahead is allowed for me. Ahead is safe. I am building something that stays.
Say it out loud, hand on heart, three times each morning for three days. If "ahead is safe" doesn't feel true, try: "I am practising believing that ahead is safe." That smaller step is the same work.
Adapted from Day 9 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Day 9 works with the inherited belief that getting ahead is not available to your family.
